title: The Crew Searches for Proof
description: On pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this part focuses on toward the knock up stream. The search for sky island becomes more concrete as the crew learns about unusual currents, salvage rivals, and the legends around Jaya.
scene: This scene belongs to the Toward the Knock Up Stream sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Luffy, Nami, Usopp, Sanji, Zoro.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Is this where the ship sank!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Every sunken ship is mine! ukikiki!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Answer my damn question already, ukeee!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: YOU'RE asking ME a question now!?

summary: The search for sky island becomes more concrete as the crew learns about unusual currents, salvage rivals, and the legends around Jaya.
